exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S21-T2-A-E1
from pathlib import Path
from docx import Document

path = Path("informe.docx")
doc = Document()
doc.add_heading("Informe sintético", 0)
doc.add_heading("Resumen", 1)
doc.add_paragraph("Muestra reconciliada: valor=40")
doc.save(path)
opened = Document(path)
text = " | ".join(p.text for p in opened.paragraphs if p.text)
print(path.exists(), path.read_bytes()[:2] == b"PK")
print("Resumen" in text, "valor=40" in text)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer S21-T2-A-E1: partí del starterCode e instruction del quiz_card «E1 (guiado) — Concepto: DOCX con heading y n=. Fixture `S21-T2-A-E1` / datos sintéticos: path = Path("informe.docx"); doc = Document(). Comp…». Completé el contrato Pass con código ancla `from pathlib import Path`. Pista del paquete: «La firma de un DOCX comienza con bytes PK porque es un paquete ZIP.». Solo usé theory/iDo/hints de esta sección.

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S21-T2-A-E2
from docx import Document

levels = [("Resumen", 1), ("Método", 2), ("Anexos", 1)]
doc = Document()
for text, level in levels:
    doc.add_heading(text, level)
doc.save("estructura.docx")
opened = Document("estructura.docx")
styles = [p.style.name for p in opened.paragraphs if p.text]
print(styles.count("Heading 1"))
print(styles)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer S21-T2-A-E2: partí del starterCode e instruction del quiz_card «E2 (independiente) — Concepto: conteo de estilos Heading. Fixture `S21-T2-A-E2` / datos sintéticos: levels = [("Resumen", 1), ("Método", 2),…». Completé el contrato Pass con código ancla `from docx import Document`. exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S21-T2-A-E3
from docx import Document

metrics = [("Ticket mediano", "28.0"), ("Reclamos", "—")]
doc = Document()
doc.add_heading("Auditoría", 1)
table = doc.add_table(rows=1, cols=2)
table.rows[0].cells[0].text = "Métrica"
table.rows[0].cells[1].text = "Valor"
for name, value in metrics:
    cells = table.add_row().cells
    cells[0].text, cells[1].text = name, value
doc.save("auditoria.docx")
opened = Document("auditoria.docx")
rows = [[c.text for c in row.cells] for row in opened.tables[0].rows]
print(rows[1])
print(rows[2], rows[2][1] != "0")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer S21-T2-A-E3: partí del starterCode e instruction del quiz_card «E3 (transferencia) — Concepto: extracción de texto al reabrir. Fixture `S21-T2-A-E3` / datos sintéticos: metrics = [("Ticket mediano", "28.0…». Completé el contrato Pass con código ancla `from docx import Document`. Pista del paquete: «La tabla debe contener columnas métrica y valor.». Solo usé theory/iDo/hints de esta sección. Variante explorer del ancla `from docx import Document`.

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S21-T2-B-E1
from pathlib import Path
from pypdf import PdfReader
from reportlab.pdfgen import canvas

path = Path("digital.pdf")
c = canvas.Canvas(str(path))
c.drawString(72, 760, "Resumen sintetico valor=40")
c.save()
text = PdfReader(path).pages[0].extract_text() or ""
print(path.read_bytes()[:4] == b"%PDF")
print("valor=40" in text)

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S21-T2-B-E2
from pathlib import Path
import fitz
from reportlab.pdfgen import canvas

pdf, png = Path("render.pdf"), Path("render-p1.png")
c = canvas.Canvas(str(pdf))
c.drawString(72, 760, "Hallazgo H1")
c.save()
document = fitz.open(pdf)
document[0].get_pixmap().save(png)
print(pdf.stat().st_size > 0, png.stat().st_size > 0)

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S21-T2-B-E3
from pathlib import Path
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
from pypdf import PdfReader
from reportlab.pdfgen import canvas

png, pdf = Path("scan.png"), Path("scan.pdf")
image = Image.new("RGB", (500, 120), "white")
ImageDraw.Draw(image).text((20, 40), "Documento sintetico valor=17", fill="black")
image.save(png)
c = canvas.Canvas(str(pdf), pagesize=(500, 120))
c.drawImage(str(png), 0, 0, width=500, height=120)
c.save()
text = PdfReader(pdf).pages[0].extract_text() or ""
print(pdf.read_bytes()[:4] == b"%PDF", "valor=17" not in text)
print({"needs_ocr": not bool(text.strip()), "n_chars": len(text)})
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer S21-T2-B-E3: partí del starterCode e instruction del quiz_card «E3 (transferencia) — Concepto: PDF imagen-only → needs_ocr. Pista del paquete: «No agregues texto con drawString al PDF: eso crearía capa digital.». Solo usé theory/iDo/hints de esta sección.
